name: Cardano Governance
description: CIP-1694 governance model — actors, voting, actions, ratification, and constitutional framework.

name: Smart Contracts
description: Plutus platform, on-chain languages, EUTxO model, patterns, protocols, tooling, and standards.

name: Governance Actors
description: All governance participants: DReps, SPOs, CC, and ada holders.

name: Governance Action Types
description: The seven types of governance action defined by CIP-1694.

name: Protocol Parameters
description: Parameter groups and individual protocol parameters.

name: Smart Contract Languages
description: All on-chain programming languages targeting Plutus Core.
sparql:
PREFIX cardano: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/cardano-knowledge-maps/vocab/cardano#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a cardano:SmartContractLanguage }

name: Developer Tooling
description: SDKs, explorers, and infrastructure for building on Cardano.
sparql:
PREFIX cardano: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/cardano-knowledge-maps/vocab/cardano#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a cardano:DeveloperTool }

name: Who Votes on What
description: All voting relationships — which bodies vote on which action types.

name: Threshold & Ratification Network
description: Voting thresholds, ratification process, and what they connect to.

name: Constitutional Enforcement
description: The constitution, guardrails script, and the CC — how constitutionality is enforced.

name: Delegation Paths
description: How ada holders delegate voting power and stake — DReps, SPOs, and pre-defined options.

name: Plutus Execution Model
description: From Plutus Core through the CEK machine to execution units and cost models.

name: Vasil-Era Features
description: Reference scripts, reference inputs, and inline datums — the Vasil hard fork features.

name: CIP Standards
description: All Cardano Improvement Proposals referenced in the graph.
sparql:
PREFIX cardano: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/cardano-knowledge-maps/vocab/cardano#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a cardano:CIP }

name: Treasury & Budgeting
description: Treasury withdrawals, budgeting mechanism, and economic parameters.

name: Hard Fork Governance
description: How hard forks are proposed, who votes, and what SPOs must do.

name: Neighborhood
description: A node and everything directly connected to it.

name: Filter by Kind
description: All nodes of a given kind.
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:$kindId }

name: Filter by Group
description: All nodes belonging to a group.

name: DApps & Protocols
description: Decentralized applications and protocols built on Cardano.
sparql:
PREFIX cardano: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/cardano-knowledge-maps/vocab/cardano#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a cardano:DApp }

name: Language Compilation Chain
description: How smart contract languages compile down to Plutus Core and execute on the CEK machine.

name: Provenance Activities
description: All governance actions and processes modeled as PROV-O activities.

name: Plutus V3 Features
description: CIPs that shipped with Plutus V3 in the Conway era: script uniformization, sums-of-products, BLS curves.

name: Wallet & Metadata Standards
description: CIPs for wallet connectivity and governance metadata: CIP-30, CIP-95, CIP-100, CIP-108, CIP-119, CIP-88.

name: Ontology Classes
description: All OWL/RDFS classes rendered as ontology nodes.

name: Class Hierarchy
description: Ontology classes that participate in subclass relationships.

name: Ontology Subtree
description: A class and all descendants beneath a selected ontology root.
sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?node WHERE {
  ?class rdfs:subClassOf* ?ancestor .
  FILTER(isIRI(?class) && isIRI(?ancestor))
  BIND(CONCAT("owl-", LCASE(REPLACE(REPLACE(STR(?class), "^.*(#|/)", ""), "[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "-"))) AS ?node)
  BIND(CONCAT("owl-", LCASE(REPLACE(REPLACE(STR(?ancestor), "^.*(#|/)", ""), "[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "-"))) AS ?ancestorNode)
  FILTER(?ancestorNode = "$root")
}

name: Ontology Properties
description: Classes connected by object properties with declared domains and ranges.

name: Ontology Alignments
description: Classes touched by equivalentClass or equivalentProperty mappings.
